case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. TONY FOSTER SR ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 200033670) TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGEMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 AND 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 68259620) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-18-2022 CONTINUED TO DEC-13-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200033670) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FOSTER SR, TONY AKA TONY FOSTER DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-2022
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 200033670) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200036905), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. SERVED AUG-17-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FOSTER SR, TONY AKA TONY FOSTER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-16-2022 CONTINUED TO OCT-18-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $315.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 68259620) AS TO DEFENDANT FOSTER SR, TONY AKA TONY FOSTER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-13-2022 CONTINUED TO FEB-28-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 395 (B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 200033670) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-16-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOSTER SR, TONY AKA TONY FOSTER $5,504.44 PRINCIPAL, $315.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,820.34, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 68259620) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 68259620) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-28-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
